title: Testbook is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Testbook is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
